name: @tanattv/lyt
description: Fast, friendly CLI to download YouTube audio and video with yt-dlp and ffmpeg.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
lyt installed. Make sure yt-dlp and ffmpeg are on your PATH.
  yt-dlp: https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp#installation
  ffmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html
')"
